title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 243.510 - Suits to be brought in name of state
text:
243.510.  Suits to be brought in name of state. — Suits on bonds for costs and the performance and completion of work on contract shall be brought in the name of the state of Missouri at the relation and to the use of the drainage district.
(RSMo 1939 § 12440) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10850; 1919 § 4517; 1909 § 5621
